backup.full_text:
My game is based on OpenGL 3 and here is a screenshot of it running on Nvidia 9800 GTX+ from 2009. I never intended to support old hardware, but at some point I became curious how far back I can push it. 27 fps with everything maxed out, no visual glitches.
#gamedev #indiedev https://t.co/P9Vc2crghF
backup.summary: 开发者成功让基于OpenGL 3的游戏运行在2009年的Nvidia 9800 GTX+显卡上，帧率27fps无故障。
angles: 15年老显卡跑新游戏｜开发者的极限挑战
